zh.Whitney on Wye, Hereford, Herefordshire,: 英國英格蘭賀福爾特尼--也
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Eustace de Whitney於1411年出生在英國賀福爾特尼--也時，他的父親Sir Robert Whitney II18歲，母親Gwenllian Oldcastle19歲。他於1430年與Jennet Trussell在英國賀福爾特尼--也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Eustace de Whitney于1411年出生在英国賀福爾特尼--也时，他的父亲Sir Robert Whitney II18岁，母亲Gwenllian Oldcastle19岁。他于1430年与Jennet Trussell在英国賀福爾特尼--也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whitney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitney in Herefordshire, the etymology of which is uncertain. The second element is Old English ēg ‘island, piece of higher ground in a low-lying area’; the first appears to be hwītan, which is either the genitive singular of an Old English byname Hwīta (meaning ‘white’), or the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of the adjective hwīt ‘white’. The name may also derive from Whitney (now Whitney Wood) in Stevenage (Hertfordshire), probably named from Old English hwītan ‘white’ + (ge)hæge ‘enclosure’.
History: John Whitney came from London, England, to Watertown, MA, in 1635, and had numerous prominent descendents.

variants.name: Witney
meanings: English: habitational name from Witney in Oxfordshire, which for centuries was a centre of the wool trade, famous in particular for the manufacture of blankets. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Witta (genitive Wittan) + Old English ēg, īeg ‘island’. There may have been some confusion with Whitney .

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Eustace de Whitney was born in 1411, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Whitney II, was 18 and his mother, Gwenllian Oldcastle, was 19. He married Jennet Trussell in 1430, in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1481, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales: Talgarth, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Eustace de Whitney est né en 1411, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Whitney II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian Oldcastle, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Jennet Trussell en 1430, à Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1481, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Eustace de Whitney 1411 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Whitney II 18 und seine Mutter Gwenllian Oldcastle 19. Er hat 1430 in Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England Jennet Trussell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1481 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Eustace de Whitney è nato il nel 1411 nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Whitney II, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian Oldcastle, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Jennet Trussell nel 1430, nel Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1481, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Eustace de Whitney(이)가 1411년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Whitney II(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Oldcastle(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1430년 영국 허퍼드실르 휘트니--w예에서 Jennet Trussell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Eustace de Whitney nasceu em 1411, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Whitney II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian Oldcastle, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jennet Trussell em 1430, em Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1481, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Eustace de Whitney родился в 1411 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Whitney II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Oldcastle, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jennet Trussell в 1430 г. в местности уитни-он-ви, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1481 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Eustace de Whitney nació en 1411, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Whitney II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Gwenllian Oldcastle, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jennet Trussell en 1430, en Whitney-on-Wye, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1481, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
